response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial projects, they lack direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and show no evidence of working on routing tiling, map optimization, or distributed systems for navigation data — core requirements for this role.
strengths: Built open-source GIS platform used by real-world mapping projects
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency systems or map tile generation
Lacks explicit experience with fault tolerance, consistency, or distributed systems for navigation data
